source: owner screenshot of Claude.app Home page, 2026-07-13 (2000x1307, ~1.32x scale of 1512pt window)

sidebar: traffic lights row + sidebar-toggle + search icons
Home | Code segmented toggle (pill slider, Home active shows house icon)
nav: + New (active grey row), Projects, Artifacts, Scheduled, Dispatch [Beta chip], Customize
Recents header w/ filter icon; ~20 recent chats w/ speech-bubble or list icons; View all
footer: avatar + 'Conor · Max' + chevron + download icon
main: centered: orange asterisk mark + serif greeting 'Good evening, Conor' (large, ~42px, serif)
composer card: rounded ~16px, subtle border+shadow; placeholder 'How can I help you today?'
composer bottom row: + button | Chat/Cowork pill toggle (Cowork active = white pill in grey track) | right: 'Sonnet 4.6' + 'Medium' dropdown + mic icon
attached tray below card: 'Project or folder' dropdown, 'Manual' dropdown w/ hand icon, right: lightning '2x more usage until August 5'
'Ideas for you' muted label + 3 rows: icon tile + label (Send me a daily briefing / Organize my inbox / Customize Cowork for me)
keyFacts: CHAT AND COWORK ARE ONE PAGE now - a composer toggle, not separate nav destinations
Code is a sidebar-level TAB alongside Home (Claude Code desktop lives inside the Claude app)
